mapper.insert:
insert into t_uasl_reservation
uasl_reservation_id,
start_at,
end_at,
reserved_at,
uasl_section_ids,
operator_id,
evaluation_results, third_party_evaluation_results, railway_operation_evaluation_results,
planned_deviation,
#{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reservedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{uaslSectionIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.uasl.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{evaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
#{thirdPartyEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
#{railwayOperationEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
#{plannedDeviation,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
on conflict (uasl_reservation_id) do update set
uasl_reservation_id = EXCLUDED.uasl_reservation_id,
start_at = EXCLUDED.start_at,
end_at = EXCLUDED.end_at,
reserved_at = EXCLUDED.reserved_at,
uasl_section_ids = EXCLUDED.uasl_section_ids,
operator_id = EXCLUDED.operator_id,
evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.evaluation_results, third_party_evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.third_party_evaluation_results, railway_operation_evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.railway_operation_evaluation_results,
planned_deviation = EXCLUDED.planned_deviation,
mapper.update:
update t_uasl_reservation
start_at = #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_at = #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reserved_at = #{reservedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
uasl_section_ids = #{uaslSectionIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.uasl.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluation_results = #{evaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
third_party_evaluation_results = #{thirdPartyEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
railway_operation_evaluation_results = #{railwayOperationEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
planned_deviation = #{plannedDeviation,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
where uasl_reservation_id = #{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT reservation.planned_deviation FROM t_uasl_reservation as reservation WHERE uasl_reservation_id = #{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select uasl_reservation_id, start_at, end_at, reserved_at, uasl_section_ids, operator_id, evaluation_results, third_party_evaluation_results, railway_operation_evaluation_results, planned_deviation from t_uasl_reservation where end_at > #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and uasl_section_ids && #{uaslSectionIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.uasl.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler} order by start_at ASC
